game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: Players operate an ice cream sundae shop, taking customer orders at the Order Station, then meticulously preparing them through the Build, Blend, and Top Stations, aiming for precision in pouring, blending, and topping placement. The game's core system revolves around customer satisfaction, where speed and accuracy in fulfilling orders directly impact the tips earned and customer patience meters.
game_info.description: Welcome to Papa's Freezeria! Run your own ice cream shop by taking customer orders and creating perfect sundaes. Operate four stations: Order, Build, Blend, and Top to create delicious treats. Pour the right amount of ingredients, blend to the perfect consistency, and arrange toppings precisely. Satisfy customers to earn tips and advance through the day. Can you handle the pressure as more customers arrive?
game_info.controls:
Arrow Left/Right: Move between stations
Arrow Up/Down: Select ingredients or options within a station
Space: Confirm selection or action
Z: Pour ingredients (hold to pour at Build station)
Shift: Special action (varies by station)
Enter: Start game from title screen
Esc: Pause/unpause game
R: Restart game when on game over screen
game_info.automated_testing:
<TEST_1>
<test_description>Tests the basic functionality of the game by ensuring it runs without errors and responds to player inputs using randomly changing sticky keys.</test_description>
<strategy_description>Continuously switches between random actions at each station, attempting to serve customers by cycling through all game stations.</strategy_description>
<expected_outcome>The game runs smoothly without errors, allowing the test to progress through multiple customer orders regardless of efficiency.</expected_outcome>
</TEST_1>

<TEST_2>
<test_description>Tests the win condition by efficiently serving customers to reach the daily goal with high satisfaction ratings.</test_description>
<strategy_description>Strategically completes each station with optimal timing and accuracy, maximizing customer satisfaction to efficiently reach the target score.</strategy_description>
<expected_outcome>The game reaches the GAME_OVER_WIN state after serving enough customers with high satisfaction to meet the daily goal.</expected_outcome>
</TEST_2>

<TEST_3>
<test_description>Tests customer patience mechanics by deliberately delaying service at various stations.</test_description>
<strategy_description>Takes orders but intentionally delays completion at different stations to observe how customer patience decreases over time.</strategy_description>
<expected_outcome>Customer patience meters decrease predictably with delays, and customers leave if kept waiting too long, demonstrating the time pressure mechanic works correctly.</expected_outcome>
</TEST_3>

<TEST_4>
<test_description>Tests accuracy mechanics by deliberately creating imperfect sundaes with incorrect ingredients or poor timing.</test_description>
<strategy_description>Takes orders but intentionally uses wrong ingredients, over/under pours, or places toppings incorrectly to test customer satisfaction penalties.</strategy_description>
<expected_outcome>Customer satisfaction decreases proportionally to errors made, resulting in lower tips and scores, confirming the accuracy scoring system works as intended.</expected_outcome>
</TEST_4>

<TEST_5>
<test_description>Tests the game's difficulty progression by efficiently serving customers until later game stages.</test_description>
<strategy_description>Serves customers quickly and accurately to progress through multiple day phases to observe increasing customer complexity and frequency.</strategy_description>
<expected_outcome>The game successfully increases difficulty with more complex orders and decreased patience timers in later phases, confirming the difficulty curve functions properly.</expected_outcome>
</TEST_5>
